Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-20-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: James L. Heideman, Esq. 773-1868 for pltf/x-deft Stimmel, Stimmel & Smith, P.C., and x-defts Andrine K. Smith & Lee D. Stimmel; Mark E. McKeen, Esq. 442-0900 for deft/x-complainant Double Wood Investment, Inc.
RULING: The Court announced a change in its tentative ruling; the Court's tentative ruling is now as follows: As to Double Wood's motion as to breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing denied; Double Wood motion for summary judgment as to declaratory relief granted. Stimmel motion as to breach of contract and money received denied.
Argued and the Court adopted its revised tentative ruling above. Parties to meet and confer on order otherwise each may submit own proposed orders.
